mapper.sql: id, project_name, name, amount, planned_date, actual_date, status, note, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM invoice_milestone WHERE LOWER(project_name) = LOWER(#{projectName}) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM invoice_milestone WHERE LOWER(project_name) = LOWER(#{projectName}) AND status IN ('invoiced', 'paid')
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM invoice_milestone WHERE LOWER(project_name) = LOWER(#{projectName}) AND status = 'paid'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invoice_milestone (project_name, name, amount, planned_date, actual_date, status, note, sort_order) VALUES (#{projectName}, #{name}, #{amount}, #{plannedDate}, #{actualDate}, #{status}, #{note}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE invoice_milestone SET name = #{name}, amount = #{amount}, planned_date = #{plannedDate}, actual_date = #{actualDate}, status = #{status}, note = #{note}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM invoice_milestone WHERE LOWER(project_name) = LOWER(#{projectName})
